title: hesperantha inconspicua
intro: Hesperantha inconspicua, also known as the dwarf blue flag or yellow hesperantha, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hesperantha inconspicua include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and in some cultures, it is also used to make a poultice to apply topically for wound healing and pain relief.
